title: turanga euphratica
intro: Turanga euphratica, also known as Turangaa, is a plant native to the Himalayas and parts of India, belonging to the family Polygonaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Turanga euphratica include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, and is also used topically in poultices to treat skin conditions and wounds.
